summary: Coach Dashboard Live Indicators (V1 Notifications) testing completed. Backend 100% pass (15/15). Frontend mostly working with one bug: toast appears on first load when director requests (5) arrive after initial data.

ui_bugs.issue: Toast '5 new director requests' appears on first page load. The isFirstLoad ref only guards the first data arrival, but directorRequestCount is fetched separately and arrives after isFirstLoad is set to false, triggering a comparison (5 > 0) and firing a toast.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Track first load of directorRequestCount separately, or ensure prevRef.current.directorRequestCount is null/undefined initially and skip comparison when prev value is falsy

action_items: Fix useLiveIndicators hook to not show toast on first director request count arrival. Suggestion: Add separate flag like isFirstDirectorCount.current or check if prev.directorRequestCount is undefined/0 before showing toast
critical_code_review_comments: Line 73-79 in CoachView.js: The director request toast comparison 'directorRequestCount > prev.directorRequestCount' fires on first load because directorRequestCount starts at 0 and prevRef stores that value before the actual count (5) arrives. Fix: Add condition to check if this is the first non-zero value.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 features verified, 1 bug with first-load toast)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Coach Live Indicators V1 tested. Key data-testid selectors: live-updated-label (shows 'Updated just now' or 'Updated Xs ago'), kpi-value-my-athletes (14), kpi-value-need-action (10), kpi-value-events-this-week (6), kpi-value-director-requests (5), coach-hero, coach-summary-card, todays-priorities-card. Bug found: Toast fires on first load for director requests. Support Pod at /support-pods/athlete_3 works correctly.

endpoints_tested: /api/support-pods/athlete_3 - returns athlete data with active issue

no_toast_on_first_load.issue: Toast '5 new director requests' appears on first load

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Toast appears on first load for director requests
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In useLiveIndicators hook, isFirstLoad.current guards only the first data arrival. directorRequestCount is fetched separately via a second API call and arrives after isFirstLoad is set to false. When it arrives (value 5), the comparison directorRequestCount (5) > prev.directorRequestCount (0) evaluates to true and fires the toast.
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe toast '5 new director requests' appears within 3 seconds of dashboard loading
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Modify line 73 to add condition: if (prev.directorRequestCount > 0 && directorRequestCount > prev.directorRequestCount). This ensures toast only fires when there's a legitimate increase from a non-zero previous value.
